docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, TYLER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN $840.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $885.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $840.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-20-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $980.72 WRIT ISSUED ON 09/05/17 TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY. (ORIGINAL WRIT RETAINED BY LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF PURSUANT TO CCP 263.7) AS TO DEFENDANT HORY, ROBIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TYLER ANDERSON APPEARED. DEFENDANT ROBIN HORY APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
